growthexperiments-exception-no-mentored-: Isticmaaluhu ma laha hage, taas oo macnaheedu yahay in {{GENDER:$1|isaga|iyada|iyaga}} weydiin karin su'aal hagihiisa {{GENDER:$1|isaga|iyada|iyaga}}.
growthexperiments-mentor-dashboard-must-: Si aad u hawlgeliso Looxa Hagaha, {{GENDER:|waxaad}} marka hore u baahan tahay inaad [[$1|iska diiwaangeliso hage ahaan]].
growthexperiments-mentor-dashboard-misco: Ka hor inta aan la isticmaalin Looxa Hagaha, liiska hagayaasha waa in marka hore la habeeyaa. Maamule ayaa u isticmaali kara [[Special:EditGrowthConfig]] ujeeddadaas.
growthexperiments-mentor-dashboard-mente: Hoos ka eeg {{GENDER:|ardaydaada}}. Isticmaal shaandhooyinka si aad u beddesho ardayda la soo bandhigayo.
Jadwalkani wuxuu u baahan yahay JavaScript. Fadlan daar JavaScript si aad u isticmaali karto qaybtan.
Macluumaad dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan cidda ku jirta  {{GENDER:|jadwalkaaga}}

Jadwalkani wuxuu muujinayaa ardaydaada {{GENDER:|aad}} ee akoonkooda la sameeyay labadii toddobaad ee la soo dhaafay ama wax ka beddel sameeyay lixdii bilood ee ugu dambeysay, isla markaana leh [https://mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Growth/Feature_summary#NH bogga hore ee cusub ee isticmaalaha oo shaqaynaya]. Xogta waxaa la cusboonaysiiyaa saddexdii saacadoodba mar.
Tirada wax ka beddellada la celiyey
Markii ugu dambeysay waxaa la cusboonaysiiyay $1 kahor
Shaandhee la tashanayaasha  firfircoonaa $2 {{PLURAL:$1|maalmo|maalmood}} ee ugu dambeeyay
Shaandhee la tashanayaasha firfircoonaa $2 {{PLURAL:$1|bil|bilood}} ee ugu dambeeyay
Sii furi foomka shaandheeyayaasha la tashanayaasha
Soo ururi foomka shaandheeyayaasha la tashanayaasha
Lama helin la tashanayaal firfircoonaa dhowaan

keliya la tashanayaasha firfircoonaa dhowaan. Macluumaad dheeraad ah waxaa lagu muujin karaa astaanta macluumaadka. Haddii {{GENDER:|aad}} dhowaan isku qortay barnaamijka hagidda, {{GENDER:|waxaa}} laga yaabaa inaan weli laguu qoondeyn wax la tashanayaal ah.
Beddel {{GENDER:|shaandheeyayaashaada}} si aad u hesho la tashanayaal.
Isbeddelladii dhowaa ee ay sameeyeen {{GENDER:|la tashanayaashaada}}
{{GENDER:|Waxaad}} ku arki kartaa waxkabeddellada ay sameeyeen dhammaan {{GENDER:|la tashanayaashaada}} adigoo booqanaya [$1 muuqaalkan shaandheysan ee Isbeddelladii dhowaa].
Khalad aan la garanayn ayaa dhacay marka la raryey liiska la tashanayaasha
Haddii ay tani sii socoto, fadlan u sheeg khalkhalkan horumariyayaasha.
Khalad aan la garanayn ayaa dhacay. Fadlan isku day mar kale hadhow.
growthexperiments-mentor-dashboard-mento: {{GENDER:|Haddii aad rabto}} inaad si joogto ah uga baxdo latalinta, waxaad sidaas ku samayn kartaa adigoo adeegsanaya Special:QuitMentorship. Gujinta "OK" waxay ku wareejin doontaa halkaas.
Maadaama aad maqan tahay ilaa $1, dadka aad lataliso si ku meel gaar ah ayaa loogu wareejin doonaa lataliye kale.

{{GENDER:|Adiga}} hadda waa lagaa xannibay. {{GENDER:|Xaaladdaada}} si ku meel gaar ah ayaa loo dhigay "maqan" waxaana {{GENDER:|dadka aad lataliso}} si ku meel gaar ah loogu wareejiyay lataliye kale. Haddii {{GENDER:|lagaa qaado xannibaadda}} (ama ay dhammaato), markaas {{GENDER:|xaaladdaada}} waxaa loo dhigi doonaa "Firfircoon" waxaana {{GENDER:|dadka aad lataliso}} dib loogu wareejin doonaa {{GENDER:|adiga}}.
{{GENDER:|Adiga}} hadda waa lagaa xannibay. Ma beddeli kartid {{GENDER:|xaaladdaada lataliye}} intaa xanniban tahay.
$1 {{GENDER:$1|wuu}} hadda qufulan yahay. {{GENDER:$1|Xaaladda lataliye}} lama beddeli karo inta uu qufulan yahay.

Haddii {{GENDER:|aad}}an awoodin inaad hagto muddo cayiman (ka badan 1 toddobaad) {{GENDER:|waxaad}} iska dhigi kartaa {{GENDER:|naftaada}} mid maqan. Inta lagu jiro muddadaas hage kale ayaa heli doona su'aalaha ka imanaya {{GENDER:|la tashanayaashaada}}.
Muddada ugu badan ee lataliye uu maqan noqon karo waa $1 (hal sano).
Khalad aan la garanayn ayaa dhacay. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
Fariin ku socota dadka aad lataliso
Waxaad u wareejin kartaa lataliye ahaan naftaada. Tan badanaa waxaa loo isticmaalaa dhacdooyinka tababarka si macallimiintu ay u noqdaan lataliye cusub labadaba gudaha iyo dibadda wiki-ga.
growthexperiments-rcfilters-mentorship-s: La tashanayaasha loo xilsaaray {{GENDER:|adiga}} ee {{GENDER:|aad}} ku xiddigaysay loox shaqeedka {{GENDER:|hagahaaga}}
growthexperiments-rcfilters-mentorship-u: La tashanayaasha kale ee loo xilsaaray {{GENDER:|adiga}}
growthexperiments-quit-mentorship-has-me: Waa wax laga xumaado in la arko {{GENDER:|bixitaankaaga}}. Si aad uga tagto hagidda, {{GENDER:|waxaad}} u baahan tahay inaad buuxiso foomka hoose. Markaad gudbiso, dhammaan la-tashanayaashaada waxaa loo wareejin doonaa hage kale. Tani dib looma celin karo. Haddii {{GENDER:|aad}} u baahan tahay fasax hagidda, beddelkeeda tixgeli inaad heerkaaga u beddesho Maqan ama aad yarayso tirada la-tashanayaasha laguu xilsaaray. {{GENDER:|Waxaad}} isbeddelladan ka samayn kartaa [[Special:MentorDashboard|dejinta loox-shaqeedkaaga {{GENDER:|hagaha}}]].
growthexperiments-quit-mentorship-reassi: Haa, dib ugu wareeji dadka aan latalinaayo lataliye kale
growthexperiments-quit-mentorship-succes: La tashanayaashaada waxaa dhowaan loo wareejin doonaa hageyaal kale.
echo-pref-tooltip-ge-mentorship: Ogeysiisyada la xiriira astaamaha latalinta ee ay maamusho kooxda Growth. Ogeysiiskan wuxuu ku ogeysiinayaa in lagu qaatay adigoo mentee ah, ama in mid ka mid ah dadka aad lataliso uu qof kale qaatay.
growthexperiments-notification-header-ne: {{GENDER:|Waxaad}} leedahay la tashanayaal mudan ammaan! U dir dhiirigelin la tashanayaasha adoo u maraya loox shaqeedkaaga hagaha.
growthexperiments-mentor-dashboard-mento: Tirada dadka ii loo xilsaaray inaan lataliyo
Midna (aniga ayaa si gacanta ah u qaata)
Khalad aan la garanayn ayaa dhacay. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

Dadka la latalinaayo si aan kala sooc lahayn ayaa loogu qoondeeyaa lataliyayaasha marka akoonadooda la abuuro. Waxaad maamuli kartaa inta mentee ee laguugu qoondeeyo, laakiin qaar ka mid ah la taliye ayaa su’aalo waydiin kara si ka badan kuwa kale.
Waxaa lagu talinayaa inaad ku bilowdo “Celcelis” si aad u cabbirto awooddaada taageero ka hor inta aadan kordhin ama yareyn.
growthexperiments-mentor-dashboard-perso: Salaan $1, waxaan ahay lataliyahaaga. Mahadsanid wax ku biirintaada. Waxaan arkay inaad si firfircoon wax u tafatirtay, waxaanan rabay inaan waqti yar u qaato si aan kuugu mahadceliyo oo aan kuu sheego inaan rajaynayo inaad sii wadi doonto ka-qaybgalka! Haddii aad wax su’aalo ah qabtid, xor ayaad u tahay inaad fariin iigu reebto boggayga wadahadalka. Mahadsanid!
Fariimaha togan ee ka yimaada isticmaaleyaasha khibradda leh iyo lataliyayaasha waxay kordhiyaan sii-haynta tafatirayaasha.
Macluumaad dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan module-ka ammaaninta gaarka loo habeeyay.
U dir la taliyahaaga fariin dhiirrigelin ah boggiisa wadahadalka.
Waxqabadka wax ka beddelka ee ku-biiraha cusub badanaa wuu kordhaa marka uu mahadcelin ama fariimo kale oo dhiirigelin ah oo ku saabsan shaqadiisa ka helo tifaftire khubaro ah ama hage.
{{GENDER:|Adiga}} waxaad habeyn kartaa fariintaada caadiga ah ee dejimaha.
Cabbir: $1 {{PLURAL:$1|tafatir|tafatirro}} ee $2 {{PLURAL:$2|maalin|maalmo}} ee ugu dambeysay. Ku hagaaji tirooyinkan dejinta.
La tashanayaasha mudan ammaanta ayaa halkan lagu tusi doonaa.
$1 ka mid ah $2 {{PLURAL:$2|la taliye mudan ammaan|la taliyayaasha mudan ammaan}}
(Ikhtiyaari) Maxay tahay sababta aad {{GENDER:|u doonaysid}} inaad uga gudubto {{GENDER:$1|la tashanahan}}?

U-gudubka la tashanaha wuxuu ka saarayaa liiska mudan ammaanta si ku-meel-gaar ah ($1 {{PLURAL:$1|maalin|maalmood}}). Waxay dib u soo muuqan karaan ka dib haddii waxqabadkooda xiga uu buuxiyo metrikada aad {{GENDER:|doorbidayso}}.
Horey ayaan ammaan ugu diray {{GENDER:$1|la tashanahan}}
Uma malaynayo in {{GENDER:$1|la tashanahan}} uu mudan yahay ammaan
Kale / Waxaan doorbidi lahaa inaanan sheegin
Khalad aan la garanayn ayaa dhacay. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
Waad ku mahadsan tahay fariinta aad {{GENDER:|u dirtay}} {{GENDER:$1|La tashahaaga}} Ku laabo [[Special:MentorDashboard|Loox shaqeedka hagaha]].
Tafatirro lagu sameeyay gudaha waqti cayiman
Tirada ugu badan ee la taliyayaasha uu yeelan karo dib u celin
Haddii goobtan ay madhan tahay, tirada tafatirro ee la taliyayaasha ee la celiyey waa la iska indhatiraa.
Fariinta togan ee caadiga ah, $1 si otomaatig ah waxaa loogu beddelaa magaca isticmaalaha La tashanaha, $2  waxaa loogu beddelaa magaca isticmaalaha lataliyaha (haddii uu jiro).
{{GENDER:|Adiga}} waxaa lagu ogeysiin doonaa marka la tashanaha loo soo bandhigo ammaan:
Dejintaada ammaaninta gaarka loo habeeyay waa la kaydiyay.
growthexperiments-mentor-list-datatype-m: $1 waxaa laga filayay inuu noqdo $2, balse waa $3
$1 waxaa laga filayaa inuu noqdo astaan waqti sax ah oo la beddeli karo, Aqoonsiga isticmaalaha: $2
growthexperiments-mentor-list-unexpected: Qeexitaanka lataliyaha waxa ku jira fure aan la filayn $1
growthexperiments-mentor-list-invalid-we: $1 waxaa laga filayay inuu noqdo mid ka mid ah: $2, balse waa $3
growthexperiments-mentor-writer-error-al: Lataliyaha $1 hore ayaa loogu daray liiska lataliyayaasha
growthexperiments-mentor-writer-error-me: Fariinta hordhaca ah waa mid aad u dheer (Aqoonsiga isticmaale saameeyay: $2). Dhererka ugu badan waa $1.
growthexperiments-mentor-writer-error-bl: {{GENDER:|Adiga}} waxaa lagaa xannibay inaad wax ka beddesho liiska lataliyayaasha.
growthexperiments-manage-mentors-pretext: {{GENDER:|Adiga}} waxaad ka saari kartaa lataliyeyaasha jebiya xeerarka ama siyaasadaha bulshada, ama waxaad wax ka beddeli kartaa ikhtiyaarradooda la xiriira latalinta.
Maamulayaashu waxay ka saari karaan lataliyeyaasha jebiya xeerarka ama siyaasadaha bulshada. Sidoo kale waxay wax ka beddeli karaan ikhtiyaarradooda la xiriira latalinta, sida fariinta hordhaca ah.
Liiska lataliyeyaasha waxaa lagu kaydiyaa [[$1|meel magaca ee MediaWiki]], oo ay ku jirto taariikhda isbeddellada.
Si aad u noqoto lataliye, u gudub [[Special:EnrollAsMentor]].
growthexperiments-manage-mentors-error-n: Khalad: Ma jiro isticmaale leh aqoonsiga isticmaalaha la cayimay. Tani waxay u badan tahay khalad gudaha ah.
growthexperiments-manage-mentors-auto-as: Lataliyeyaasha si otomaatig ah loogu qoondeeyo akoonnada cusub
Marka isticmaale cusub uu iska diiwaan geliyo akoonkiisa {{SITENAME}}, mid ka mid ah isticmaaleyaasha soo socda si otomaatig ah ayaa loogu qoondeeyaa lataliye ahaan.
growthexperiments-manage-mentors-manuall: Lataliyeyaasha si gacanta ah u doorta dadka ay latalayaan

Akoonada cusub si otomaatig ah looguma qoondeeyo lataliyeyaashan. Lataliyeyaasha ku jira liiskan waxay kaliya lataliyaan akoonnada ay iyagu si gaar ah u doortaan, taas oo ka dhigaysa astaantan mid ku habboon martigeliyeyaasha workshops-ka ee doonaya inay sii wadaan latalinta ka qaybgalayaasha.
growthexperiments-manage-mentors-weight: Tirada dadka cusub ee la qoondeeyay
growthexperiments-manage-mentors-edit-pr: {{GENDER:|Adiga}} waxaad ku dhowdahay inaad wax ka beddesho ikhtiyaarrada la xiriira latalinta ee {{GENDER:$1|lataliyaha}} [[User:$1|$1]].
growthexperiments-manage-mentors-edit-is: Si otomaatig ah ma loogu qoondeeyaa dadka cusub ee soo galaya?
growthexperiments-manage-mentors-edit-we: Tirada dadka cusub ee la qoondeeyay
growthexperiments-manage-mentors-edit-is: Lataliyaha "$1" hadda waa xanniban yahay, mana la beddeli karo xaaladdiisa maqnaansho.
growthexperiments-manage-mentors-edit-su: Ikhtiyaarrada la xiriira latalinta ee {{GENDER:$1|lataliyaha}} [[User:$1|$1]] waa la beddelay.
growthexperiments-manage-mentors-remove-: {{GENDER:|Adiga}} waxaad ku dhowdahay {{GENDER:|inaad}} ka saarto [[User:$1|$1]] lataliye ahaan.
growthexperiments-manage-mentors-add-men: Isticmaal foomkan, waxaa suurtagal ah in lagu daro lataliye cusub nidaamka. Isticmaalaha la daray uma baahna inuu buuxiyo shuruudaha u qalmitaanka. Waxaa lagu daraa lataliye si gacanta ah loo qoondeeyay, waxayna awoodaan inay beddelaan dejintooda.
Magaca isticmaalaha lataliyaha la rabo in lagu daro
growthexperiments-manage-mentors-return-: Waxaad [[Special:ManageMentors|dib ugu laaban kartaa]] liiska lataliyayaasha.
growthexperiments-mentorship-enrollasmen: {{SITENAME}} mahadsanid {{GENDER:|adiga}} oo iskaa wax u qabso ahaan u noqday {{GENDER:|lataliye}}. {{GENDER:|Adiga}} waxaad iska diiwaan gelin kartaa lataliye adigoo buuxinaya foomkan.
Fariinta hordhaca ah waxay {{GENDER:|adiga}} ku soo bandhigaysaa lataliye ahaan. Fadlan ka dhig mid ka yar 240 xaraf. Wikitext lama oggola.
{{GENDER:|Adiga}} hadda waxaad ku qoran tahay lataliye ahaan. {{GENDER:|Adiga}} waxaad hadda sii wadan kartaa [[Special:MentorDashboard|dashboard-ka lataliyaha]].
Kaliya isticmaaleyaasha leh ugu yaraan $1 {{PLURAL:$1|tafatir|tafatirro}} iyo $2 {{PLURAL:$2|maalin|maalmo}} oo joogitaan ah ayaa iska diiwaan gelin kara lataliye ahaan.
tag-mentor_list_change-description: Calaamad lagu dabaqay tafatirrada lagu sameeyo liiska lataliyayaasha ee habaysan ee GrowthExperiments.
growthexperiments-mentor-dashboard-mento: Latalintu hadda waa dansan tahay. Maamulayaashu waxay shidi karaan Latalinta iyagoo adeegsanaya [[$1]].
growthexperiments-mentor-list-cleaner-ma: Lataliyaha $1 waxaa loo calaamadinayaa inuu maqan yahay, aan firfircoonayn muddo $2 maalmood ah
growthexperiments-mentor-list-cleaner-re: Ka saarista lataliyaha $1, aan firfircoonayn muddo $2 maalmood ah
